title: per-person completion on a single line item

posts.author: NoahK (Noah )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We’d like to have Multi assignee tasks only be removed from “my work” person by person as completed. Currently, when we have multiple team members assigned to the same task, one person marks it done and it goes away from everyone’s “my work”. This is not ideal for us because we can’t track individual progress. A lot of our shared tasks consist of training, in which case that can not be marked as done when just one person completes it.

What are you trying to achieve

per-person completion on a single line item. Shared tasks will not drop of of everyone’s “my work” tab, just the people who have actually completed the task.
